readingList.empty: Your reading list is empty. Save articles to read them later.

promptGenerator.title: AI Article Prompt Generator
promptGenerator.description: Use this form to generate a structured prompt for requesting a new blog article. Fill in the details below, and the final prompt will be generated for you to copy.
promptGenerator.draftPlaceholder: Paste your full article draft or the main points you want me to expand upon here...
promptGenerator.articleTitleDescription: Leave blank if you want the AI to create an SEO-friendly title.
promptGenerator.tagsDescription: Leave blank if you want the AI to generate relevant tags.
promptGenerator.copySuccessDescription: Prompt is ready to be pasted in the chat.
promptGenerator.promptBase: Please create and publish a new blog article for me based on the following details.
promptGenerator.titlePlaceholder: Please create an SEO-friendly title based on the content.
promptGenerator.translationYes: Yes (English & Indonesian), ensure the translationKey is the same.
promptGenerator.finalInstruction: Additional Instruction: After completion, always confirm the `translationKey` you used so I can find the files easily.
promptGenerator.imagesDescription: The first line is ALWAYS for the hero image. Each subsequent line is for a supporting image, in order of appearance in the article.
promptGenerator.imagesPlaceholder:
/images/articles/hero.webp | A descriptive alt text for the hero image
/images/articles/supporting-1.webp | Alt text for the first supporting image
